title: Release Automation, npm Trusted Publishing, and Change Control · Mastery Check
summary: A release board compares near-miss decisions for release automation, npm trusted publishing, and change control and requires the learner to defend the smallest safe multi-artifact release and publication policy. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for multi-artifact release and publication policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Derive version, tag, changelog, release notes, source commit, and authorization from a protected reviewed release process.
Build once from reviewed source, retain immutable artifacts and attestations, approve promotion, and avoid environment-specific rebuilds.
Publish with npm trusted publishing on supported hosted runners using exact repository, workflow, environment, id-token permission, and npm 11.5.1 or later.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Ci Release Version Source Authority · changed case · Quiz Ci Release Version Source Authority
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz tag rebuild publishes npm and images with long-lived tokens, missing provenance, and one-person approval. Build once, promote immutable artifacts, use trusted publishing, verify contents, and separate duties. Competency probe: Derive version, tag, changelog, release notes, source commit, and authorization from a protected reviewed release process.

Which action demonstrates Ci Release Version Source Authority without dropping earlier contracts?

For Ci Release Version Source Authority · changed case · Quiz Ci Release Version Source Authority, keep Ci Release Version Source Authority connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

Build once, promote immutable artifacts, use trusted publishing, verify contents, and separate duties. Competency probe: Derive version, tag, changelog, release notes, source commit, and authorization from a protected reviewed release process.
